debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
s : Set ℝ
hs : MeasurableSet s
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in s, exp x * f (exp x) = ∫ (y : ℝ) in exp '' s, f y

simpa [mul_comm] using
